title: The Broken Script (Made Quieter)
description: This Pack makes most of the sounds in "The Broken Script" quieter. Just incase you have sensitive ears and still wish to hear Minecraft as well as keep your eardrums working.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/JMeBXrkpwTw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This is a resource pack designed to allow those who have sensitive ears to play "The Broken Script" comfortably. Most sounds are turned down in volume, while others are either at mostly the same volume or there was no change to them.

"The Broken Script" is a mod made by Wendigodrip and RedstoneWizard_08
I do not own any of the sounds in this pack all rights go to them
